commit_scope: Breath-2 decision body: the durable-backlog DRAIN selection (fq-drain/fq-count/fq-cursor) — on reconnect, select exactly the backlog entries a cell missed (addressed to it, seq > last_seen, consent-ok kind in its interface), preserving board order, with a high-water cursor so it never re-drains. Content-blind (reads seq/to/kind, never the body); decision is Form (four-way + native), board I/O is a carrier.

local_validation.fourth_arm: field-queue band crosses four-way (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu) at verdict 127, 0 divergent; registered as 'field-queue fkc 127'.
local_validation.notes: Pure structural selection over list metadata; no host-io/node/multi-line ops -- four-way friendly.

ci_validation.notes: PR pending at evidence-write time; four-way + native proof is the local gate.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy for a stdlib recipe + band; load-bearing once the board carrier (R3) and client reconnect integration (R4, breath 4) land.

phase_gate.gate: Deliver the reconnect drain selection as a four-way + native decision body so a returning cell replays exactly its missed, consent-ok backlog in order. Board I/O carrier (R3) and client reconnect integration (R4) are named follow-ups.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A reconnecting cell can compute exactly the backlog it missed (recipient-matched, unseen, consent-ok, ordered) and a new cursor. Decision body only; observable end-to-end once the board carrier (R3) and client reconnect integration (R4, breath 4) land.
test_flows: field-queue-band.fk: drain count, order preservation, high-water cursor, consent exclusion of an un-offered kind, per-recipient match, last_seen-beyond-all yields zero -> 127 four-way + native.
e2e_validation.summary: Decision body proven (127 four-way + native). True reconnect-replay e2e pends its board carrier + client; status pending, honestly scoped.
